title: Communicate with Board members at a Board level
excerpt: Hello, I would like to be able to communicate with Board members at a Board level, not at the level of individual tasks. Is this possible? Thank you!

posts.author: EDCLU (Ricardo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to be able to communicate with Board members at a Board level, not at the level of individual tasks. Is this possible? Thank you!

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EDCLU ,

Welcome to the monday community!

This is a feature that is currently rolling out, so it should also soon be available to you as well!

How to communicate with my team

3 min read Guide     Communicating through monday.com will make things easy to refer back to at a later date and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. This article explains step by step how...
